title: Datça Quiet Coves
description: A day out in Muğla: Datça Harbour, Old Datça, Kumluk Beach, Eski Ev Cafe Bistro.
notes: Start with the tranquility of boat sounds.
Get lost in the stone houses with cobblestone streets.
Sit by the sea in the town centre's beach.
Free public toilets near the harbour.
